reviews.review_text: Tranquil, green van park. You feel like you are miles away from Sydney. Lovely amenities too.

Absolute Gem of a park. Nothing bad about it at all. Located on the banks of the Hawkesbury River on elevated ground. Huge grassed sites, outstanding facilities. Rachael is the best host making you feel very comfortable being here.
Plenty of room.  Clean and great  camp kitchen.

What an absolute ripper of a park. Spacious, green grass everywhere and beautiful vistas. This park is a must go to. Sitting perf ectly by the river, beautiful kept and clean loos, showers and laundry. Quiet and an easy drive to Pitt Town proper for shopping. Great helpful Chemist, Iga, bakery, pizzas, butcher and service Station. We have fallen in love with Percys Place and very highly recommend. Dog friendly and an amazing camp kitchen with a kitchen garden with herbs and vegies ❤️ ❤️ ❤️
Showers are Limited. Power went off in the middle of the Night. 60 Dollars in high Season!

Wat een mooie camping is dit.  Vriendelijk personeel. Behulpzaam.
Hele mooie omgeving.
Schoon en net sanitair.

Als u een goede camping op een uurtje rijden van de Bleu Mountains zoek. Dan is dit het adres.
10 out of 10 could of stayed for weeks nice to just relax dog friendly and staff are great

What a beautiful surprise , we got the next morning to see the huge grassy area in a pocket with the Hawkesbury River. The peace , fresh air very enjoyable. Very clean, camp kitchen , bathrooms and very friendly owners.
Booking and payment easy.
Spacious sites with power.
What a lovely caravan park! Beautiful outlook over the Hawkesbury River and grassy sites. The owners were so friendly and helpful.
Beautiful clean amenities, big book swap library, lovely camp kitchen . Laundry $4 ($2 coins) each load- 2 washers two dryers
Have stayed here several times. Central location.  Amenities are really good and so clean.  Lovely grass sites.  Would highly recommend.

Percy’s Place caravan park is a hidden gem in a very quiet location.

It has large grassy sites, power  water and a dump point and the facilities are excellent.
There are even are glimpses of the Hawkesbury River.

Booking was a totality contactless experience done by email and the gate code was emailed to me the day before along with our site number and a detailed map.

So glad we booked here (you have to book) and would certainly come again.  Highly recommended.
Always have a fabulous time when we are here catching up with family 💕  Owner Rachael is the bomb 👍🙂

Fantastic spacious caravan park on the river. We stayed three nights mid week and the park had only a handful of other guests. Very quiet location. Spotless amenities block as well as bbq area with library and tourist brochures. On leash dog friendly property with huge spaces to exercise the pooch.

We recently stayed at Percy's in a caravan with our dog.
What a lovely quiet place to stay. Sites were big - some with river views, amenities block spotless, there was a well thought out camp kitchen (although we didn't need to use it), and plenty of space to walk the dog.
Thanks for a great stay, Rachel.
Granny Smith

Love this site it’s an annual ritual. Roomy location with picturesque views over the river and paddocks. Out of town and away from the hustle and bustle of Richmond Windsor but not too far thats it’s out of reach from all the city offerings. The manager is extremely professional and accommodating my kind of caravan park. Recommended
Ver nice park, great grassy sites. Amenities were very clean. No noise,  good country feel about it all. Good place to stay if you are visiting friends or family out in Western Sydney.
Great caravan park, with modern amenities block,  laundry, and camp kitchen. Unfortunately no water access, but it is quiet and peaceful.

The park offer's grass sites with a  view of the Hawkesbury River. Our extended stay was necessitated by work, and the park's upkeep and cleanliness did not disappoint. The staff were attentive and professional
With friendly faces serving you and a charming atmosphere, the riverside location is perfect for watching people carve up the water on their skis.
Great location. Hosts could be a bit friendlier.

Such a beautiful place to stay!  Large beautifully maintained lawn sites, dog friendly. Right on the Hawkesbury River and views of cows in paddocks. So calm and peaceful. Amenities are clean and modern and an awesome outdoor kitchen eating area. Highly recommended.
Quiet, peacefull good amenities, beautifully situated, close to town, friendly, welcoming, on the river, clean amenities. One of the best places we have stayed by far in NSW.
Please do yourself a favor and avoid this place and these people like the plague, they are hideous people who make you feel like second class citizens.

Quiet, peaceful, clean, and tidy park. Contact less book in system that worked extremely well, very easy in fact.
Close to Pitt Town and Windsor NSW.
Easy access to city by train.

Excellent place to stay, beautiful lawn 👌 area's & facilities are extremely well kept beautiful in fact
Really freindly Service 🙋‍♂️👱‍♀️ and Dog Friendly 🐕🐶
